item.name: Stone Pleco
item.description:
This slate-hued wavekin is commonly found in the waters of Karvarhur the First.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: According to Yok Huy legend, this fish first came into being when a fallen shard of stone sprouted fins and flopped into the water. It effortlessly blends in with the rocks littering the lakebed, making it hard for predators to spot.
